svg.title: The ledger — one shape for every claim
svg.desc: Three tokens the Stop hook greps for. Verified: <claim> — ran <command/observation> -> saw <result> — evidence is attached, act on it. Assumed: <what it couldn't check> — why — how you can check it — the short list you read before you ship. PROVISIONAL: <number/result not yet safe to quote> — carries no number you can quote yet.
svg.text: THE LEDGER · ONE SHAPE FOR EVERY CLAIM
THE STOP HOOK GREPS FOR EXACTLY THESE THREE
evidence is attached — this is what you can act on today

the short honest list you read before you ship
